parameters.content:
## 🔄 Migration Airtable → PostgreSQL

**Exécuter ce workflow UNE SEULE FOIS.**

Ordre d'exécution :
1. ✅ channel_config — déjà rempli par le seed SQL
2. 🔄 credentials — migré en premier (FK)
3. 🔄 diffusion_jobs — migré en second
4. 🔄 log_events — migré en dernier

**Pré-requis** :
- PostgreSQL démarré (docker compose up)
- Credential PostgreSQL configuré dans n8n
- Les tables sont vides (premier lancement)

## ÉTAPE 1 — Credentials
Migré en premier car diffusion_jobs
a une FK vers credentials.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO diffusion.credentials (credential_ref, client_id, platform, access_token, refresh_token, client_app_id, client_secret, expires_at, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2::bigint, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8::timestamptz, $9::timestamptz, $10::timestamptz)
ON CONFLICT (credential_ref) DO NOTHING
RETURNING credential_ref;

parameters.content:
## ÉTAPE 2 — Diffusion Jobs
Table principale. FK vers credentials
doit être satisfaite.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO diffusion.jobs (
  job_id, request_id, batch_id, diffusion_id, source_agent,
  client_id, campaign_id, channel_name, credential_ref, diffusion_type,
  funnel_stage, scheduled_at, timezone, budget_amount, budget_currency,
  payload, status, retry_count, retry_max, platform_post_id, last_error,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4::bigint, $5,
  $6::bigint, $7::bigint, $8, $9, $10,
  $11, $12::timestamptz, $13, $14::numeric, $15,
  $16::jsonb, $17, $18::smallint, $19::smallint, $20, $21::jsonb,
  $22::timestamptz, $23::timestamptz
)
ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING job_id;

parameters.content:
## ÉTAPE 3 — Log Events
Table de volume. Insérés dans
la partition mensuelle automatiquement.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO diffusion.log_events (log_id, job_id, correlation_id, agent, event_type, message, timestamp)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7::timestamptz)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING log_id;
